s1.title: Consultation
s1.desc: We capture your requirements and site conditions.

s2.title: Survey & design
s2.desc: We measure on site and design the layout and drawings.

s3.title: CNC machining
s3.desc: We machine precisely to the approved drawings.

s4.title: Fabrication & welding
s4.desc: We weld PVC/PP into the finished structures.

s5.title: Installation
s5.desc: We install on site and connect the exhaust ducting.

s6.title: Maintenance
s6.desc: We provide regular inspection and fast service.

q1.q: How do I get a quote?
q1.a: Send your requirements via the contact form or by phone; we review your site conditions and provide a tailored quote.

q2.a: It depends on scale and spec, but usually 2–6 weeks after the design is finalized.

q3.a: Mainly PVC and PP for their chemical resistance and durability, chosen to fit the application.

q4.a: Yes — from fabrication to on-site install and exhaust ducting, all in one.

q5.a: We provide regular inspections and fast after-sales support after installation.

q6.a: Fill out the form on the Contact page or call our main line.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: What we do
about.lead: H3 is a specialist fabricator of PVC/PP fume hoods, refining booths, scrubbers, and exhaust ducting for chemical processes — from design through fabrication, installation, and maintenance.
about.body1: We design from on-site surveys and build chemical-resistant, durable custom equipment with precision CNC machining and expert hot-air welding.
about.body2: From small components to full turnkey installation, we deliver to each client's process and site conditions.

aside.responseBody: We reply within one business day.
aside.step2: We review the site and requirements, then quote
